title: Excise Policy case: ED moves Delhi High Court to expunge trial court's adverse remarks in discharge order
description: The Enforcement Directorate (ED) has approached the Delhi High Court to expunge remarks made against it by the trial court while discharging Arvind Kejriwal, Manish Sisodia and all the others accused in the Delhi Excise Policy case. The matter is listed for hearing before Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma on Tuesday. Justice Swarana Kanta SharmaThe ED has sought directions to expunge the remarks made by Special Judge (PC Act) Jitendra Singh in paragraphs 109, 1048, 1049, 1050, 1051,&nb
